description: WCAG contrast-ratio table + a11y checklist for design-system docs. Default mode: tabular display of color pairs with computed contrast ratio + AA/AAA badges. Checklist mode: slot-driven WCAG checklist with status icons.

childAttributes.name: data-fg
childAttributes.description: Foreground color (hex / rgb() / named); contrast mode

childAttributes.name: data-bg
childAttributes.description: Background color (hex / rgb() / named); contrast mode

childAttributes.name: data-label
childAttributes.description: Display label for the pair; defaults to button text content

childAttributes.name: data-status
childAttributes.description: Checklist mode: pass | fail | warn | na (default: na)
